g.text: not yet supported (v1 = azure-container-apps only); stop
[topology/security choice ambiguous OR a go-live landmine is statically detectable]

guesses an ambiguous decision, and NEVER demotes a
detected go-live landmine to a buried runbook STOP note.
Container Apps, ACR, Azure DB for PostgreSQL (TLS),

location, env/secret; STOP before every state-changing
or go-live step incl. the billing production gate)
secrets, App Attest required, billing production
multi-factor gate, BYOK never touches the
server, DB TLS + at-rest, pre-traffic migration

report written files; review the diagram
